description_long: This is a metallic briefcase with a ribbed, brushed steel exterior and reinforced edges, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The case is rectangular with rounded corners and features two robust latches on the front for secure closure. The lid is hinged and opens to reveal a neatly organized interior filled with stacks of bundled currency, suggesting its use for transporting valuables. A solid, fixed handle is attached to the front, designed for easy carrying. The surface of the case shows signs of wear, with subtle scratches and a matte finish, indicating frequent handling. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A rugged, metallic briefcase with a ribbed steel exterior, secure latches, and a fixed handle, containing stacks of bundled currency inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open briefcase with visible stacks of money and the handle and latches clearly displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the briefcase and the partially open lid, with the handle and latches visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the ribbed metallic back and the closed bottom half of the briefcase, with no visible handle or latches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, showing the ribbed texture and the interior filled with money.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed rectangular metal handle, attached with metal brackets, non-retractable and rigid.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two metal latches on the front, likely snap or clasp type, with no visible key or combination lock.
